root_cause: The agent is repeatedly clicking coordinates that are failing to trigger the dropdown menu, likely hitting the container or nearby text instead of the interactive button element.
fix_instruction: Instead of clicking by coordinates, use a CSS selector to click the button element with the text 'Choose...' or the ID 'a-autoid-1-announce'. Once the menu opens, click the 'Amazon.com' option from the list.

task: OVERALL INSTRUCTION: This is a multi-step workflow. You must process this ONE MODULE AT A TIME. Do NOT attempt to fill or plan for Module 2 until you have completely finished and saved Module 1 and is
root_cause: The agent is repeatedly clicking coordinates (y=160+) that land on the 'A+ Content Guidelines' link or descriptive text below the actual dropdown button, which is located higher up at approximately y=80 in the current viewport.
fix_instruction: Target the dropdown button specifically using a CSS selector like 'span#a-autoid-1-announce' or 'button[data-action="a-dropdown-button"]' instead of relying on the current misaligned coordinates. After the menu opens, click the 'Amazon.com' list item.
